all.en: We are pleased to announce that our headquarters will be moving to a new location next month.
all.zh: 我們很高興宣布公司總部將於下個月遷移至新地點。

all.en: The new office is situated on the fifteenth floor of the Crestwood Business Tower downtown.
all.zh: 新辦公室位於市中心克瑞斯伍商業大樓的十五樓。

all.en: This relocation reflects our continued growth and our commitment to a modern workplace environment.
all.zh: 這次搬遷反映了公司持續的成長以及對現代化工作環境的承諾。

all.en: The new premises offer approximately thirty percent more space than our current office building.
all.zh: 新辦公室較目前的辦公大樓多出約百分之三十的空間。

all.en: Employees will enjoy improved meeting rooms, quiet zones, and a fully equipped staff lounge.
all.zh: 員工將享有改善的會議室、安靜區，以及設備齊全的員工休息室。

all.en: An on-site cafeteria will serve breakfast, lunch, and afternoon refreshments at subsidized prices.
all.zh: 現場餐廳將以優惠價格供應早餐、午餐與下午茶點。

all.en: The official move will take place during the weekend of June fourteenth and fifteenth.
all.zh: 正式搬遷將於六月十四日及十五日的週末進行。

all.en: Professional movers have been hired to transport furniture, computers, and personal belongings.
all.zh: 我們已雇用專業搬運公司負責運送家具、電腦與個人物品。

all.en: Each employee will receive a labeled crate for personal items by the end of next week.
all.zh: 每位員工將於下週末前收到一個貼有標籤的個人物品收納箱。

all.en: Please ensure all confidential documents are sealed and clearly marked before pickup day.
all.zh: 請於收件當日前將所有機密文件密封並清楚標示。

all.en: Any unwanted items should be placed in the designated recycling bins on each floor.
all.zh: 不需要的物品請放置於各樓層指定的回收箱中。

all.en: Workstations at the new location have already been assigned according to team requirements.
all.zh: 新址的辦公座位已根據各團隊需求完成分配。

all.en: A detailed floor plan will be shared through the human resources portal this Friday.
all.zh: 詳細的樓層平面圖將於本週五透過人資入口網站分享。

all.en: The new address is 88 Crestwood Avenue, and the nearest subway station is Central Park.
all.zh: 新地址為克瑞斯伍大道八十八號，最近的地鐵站為中央公園站。

all.en: Underground parking is available, but spaces must be reserved through the facilities team.
all.zh: 地下停車場可供使用，但車位須透過總務團隊預約。

all.en: Employees who commute by bicycle can use the secure bike room on the basement level.
all.zh: 騎自行車通勤的員工可使用地下層的安全停車間。

all.en: Shower facilities will also be available for those who exercise during lunch breaks.
all.zh: 也設有淋浴設備供午休時運動的同仁使用。

all.en: Our official phone numbers will remain the same after the relocation is completed.
all.zh: 搬遷完成後公司的官方電話號碼將維持不變。

all.en: However, the main reception desk will move to a new direct line listed on the intranet.
all.zh: 不過，總櫃台將改用內部網站上公告的新直撥號碼。

all.en: Mail forwarding from the old address will be in place for six months after the move.
all.zh: 舊地址的郵件轉寄服務將於搬遷後維持六個月。

all.en: On Monday, June sixteenth, all staff are expected to report to the new headquarters.
all.zh: 六月十六日星期一，請全體同仁至新總部報到。

all.en: A welcome breakfast will be served in the main atrium between eight and ten o'clock.
all.zh: 上午八點至十點將於主中庭提供歡迎早餐。

all.en: Should you have any questions, please reach out to the relocation committee at any time.
all.zh: 若有任何疑問，歡迎隨時聯繫搬遷委員會。

all.en: Thank you for your cooperation as we transition into this exciting new chapter together.
all.zh: 在我們共同邁向這令人興奮的新篇章之際，感謝大家的配合。

all.en: A guided tour of the new premises will be offered every hour on the first day to help everyone become familiar with the layout.
all.zh: 搬遷首日將每小時舉辦一場新址導覽，協助大家熟悉空間配置。

all.en: Building access cards have been preprogrammed and will be distributed by the security team during the welcome breakfast.
all.zh: 大樓門禁卡已預先設定完成，並將於歡迎早餐時段由安全團隊發放。

all.en: Please remember to return your existing access cards to the front desk before leaving the current office on Friday evening.
all.zh: 請記得於週五傍晚離開現址辦公室前，將原有的門禁卡歸還至前台。

all.en: Information technology staff will be on site throughout the first week to address any connectivity or hardware issues.
all.zh: 資訊技術同仁將於第一週全程駐點，協助處理任何連線或硬體相關問題。

all.en: Printers and shared equipment have been pre-installed at convenient locations across the new floor.
all.zh: 印表機與共用設備已預先安裝於新樓層各處便利的位置。

all.en: Wellness rooms and nursing facilities are conveniently located near the elevator lobby on the east side of the building.
all.zh: 健康室與哺乳設施位於大樓東側電梯大廳旁，便於使用。

all.en: Energy-efficient lighting and adjustable desks have been installed throughout the workspace to enhance everyone's comfort.
all.zh: 整個工作空間皆已安裝節能照明與可調式辦公桌，以提升大家的舒適度。

all.en: A digital signage system at every entrance will display real-time meeting room availability and visitor information.
all.zh: 每個出入口的數位看板將即時顯示會議室使用狀況與訪客資訊。

all.en: Guests and vendors must register through the new visitor management system at least one business day in advance of any visit.
all.zh: 訪客與廠商至少須於來訪前一個工作日，透過新的訪客管理系統完成登記。

all.en: We look forward to celebrating our new beginning with all employees and partners during the official opening ceremony on June twentieth.
all.zh: 我們期待於六月二十日的正式開幕典禮上，與全體員工與合作夥伴共同慶祝新的開始。

all.en: Local restaurants and coffee shops surrounding the new building have offered exclusive discount programs for our staff during opening week.
all.zh: 新大樓周邊的在地餐廳與咖啡館，於開幕週推出專屬本公司員工的優惠方案。

all.en: A dedicated employee shuttle service will operate between the metro station and the lobby every fifteen minutes during morning rush hours.
all.zh: 晨間尖峰時段將安排員工專屬接駁車，於地鐵站與大廳間每十五分鐘往返一班。

all.en: The relocation committee will host informal coffee chats on each floor to address any lingering questions from employees and their teams.
all.zh: 搬遷委員會將於各樓層舉辦輕鬆的咖啡座談會，回應員工與所屬團隊的任何後續疑問。

all.en: Sustainable design features in the new building include solar panels, rainwater collection systems, and floor-to-ceiling natural lighting.
all.zh: 新大樓的永續設計特色包括太陽能板、雨水回收系統，以及落地式自然採光。

all.en: Conference rooms can now be reserved through a streamlined booking application that integrates seamlessly with our existing calendar tools.
all.zh: 會議室現可透過全新精簡化的預訂應用程式登記，並與本公司現有行事曆工具無縫整合。

all.en: Our facilities management partner will conduct safety walkthroughs every Monday afternoon throughout the first month after relocation.
all.zh: 本公司設施管理合作夥伴將於搬遷後第一個月內，每週一下午進行安全巡檢。

all.en: Bicycle storage racks and electric vehicle charging stations have been installed to support a wider range of commuting preferences.
all.zh: 為支援更多元的通勤偏好，現已設置自行車停車架與電動車充電站。

all.en: A community room on the mezzanine level will be available for employee-led clubs, volunteer initiatives, and informal gatherings.
all.zh: 中夾層設有社區活動室，可供員工自發性的社團、志工活動與非正式聚會使用。

all.en: Internal signage throughout the building will be updated quarterly to reflect departmental changes and to highlight company achievements.
all.zh: 大樓內部標示將每季更新，以反映部門異動並展示公司成就。

all.en: Thank you for your continued patience and enthusiasm as we work together to make this transition smooth and successful for everyone.
all.zh: 感謝大家持續的耐心與熱忱，讓我們共同努力使本次搬遷對每個人都順利成功。
